subject: Shift swap request
snippet: Hey John, any chance you could cover my Thursday night shift? My son has a schoo...
body: Hey John, any chance you could cover my Thursday night shift? My son has a school thing come up and I completely spaced on it when I picked up the shift. I owe you one, I can take one of yours next week if that helps.

subject: Re: Shift swap request
snippet: Yeah I can cover Thursday, no problem. Let's just say you take my Sunday afterno...
body: Yeah I can cover Thursday, no problem. Let's just say you take my Sunday afternoon shift in two weeks and we're even. I'll let charge know about the swap so it's on the schedule.

subject: Continuing education credits
snippet: Dad, just a heads up your CE credits are due for renewal at the end of the month...
body: Dad, just a heads up your CE credits are due for renewal at the end of the month. I saw the reminder email because you still have me on the account from when I helped you set it up. Do you want me to just handle the renewal or are you going to do the courses yourself this time?

subject: Re: Continuing education credits
snippet: Oh good grief, I forgot about that completely. I still need about 6 more hours. ...
body: Oh good grief, I forgot about that completely. I still need about 6 more hours. Can you send me the login again, I think I changed the password and forgot to write it down.

subject: Re: Continuing education credits
snippet: Sent it to your phone too just in case. There's a couple of good infection contr...
body: Sent it to your phone too just in case. There's a couple of good infection control modules that count double credit, might as well knock it out fast. Let me know if you get locked out again.

subject: Charge nurse note
snippet: Hey Dad, how'd the first day as charge go? Pat mentioned you were nervous about ...
body: Hey Dad, how'd the first day as charge go? Pat mentioned you were a little nervous about it when you two had coffee yesterday.

subject: Re: Charge nurse note
snippet: Busier than I expected honestly. Had a rough handoff with the night shift, one o...
body: Busier than I expected honestly. Had a rough handoff with the night shift, one of the nurses didn't chart properly on a patient in 14 and I had to track down what actually happened before I could report off. Otherwise not bad.

subject: Re: Charge nurse note
snippet: Ugh that's the worst, chasing down missing charting on top of everything else. D...
body: Ugh that's the worst, chasing down missing charting on top of everything else. Did you end up writing anyone up or just handle it quietly?

subject: Re: Charge nurse note
snippet: Just talked to her directly, no need to make it a big thing yet. If it happens a...
body: Just talked to her directly, no need to make it a big thing yet. If it happens again I'll loop in the manager. Otherwise the shift went smoother than I thought it would, glad it's over.

subject: Patient family follow-up
snippet: John, the daughter of the patient in 22 called the unit again asking for an upda...
body: John, the daughter of the patient in 22 called the unit again asking for an update. She wants to know if anyone from the care team can call her back today, she sounded pretty anxious on the phone.

subject: Re: Patient family follow-up
snippet: I'll give her a call this afternoon once I'm off the floor for a minute. Do we h...
body: I'll give her a call this afternoon once I'm off the floor for a minute. Do we have a good number for her or should I just use what's in the chart?

subject: Re: Patient family follow-up
snippet: The one in the chart should be current, that's the one she called from. I told h...
body: The one in the chart should be current, that's the one she called from. I told her someone would reach out before end of shift so try to get to it if you can.

subject: Re: Patient family follow-up
snippet: Called her just now. She's mostly worried about the discharge timeline, I walked...
body: Called her just now. She's mostly worried about the discharge timeline, I walked her through where things stand and she seemed a lot calmer after. Told her the case manager would follow up tomorrow with specifics too.

subject: Re: Patient family follow-up
snippet: Perfect, thank you for jumping on that. I'll note in the chart that family was u...
body: Perfect, thank you for jumping on that. I'll note in the chart that family was updated so nobody duplicates the call tonight.

subject: Lunch this week?
snippet: John! It's been way too long. You free for lunch this week? I'm thinking that di...
body: John! It's been way too long. You free for lunch this week? I'm thinking that diner we like off Main, my treat since I still owe you from last time.

subject: Re: Lunch this week?
snippet: Been thinking the same thing honestly. Thursday works for me if you're free, I'm...
body: Been thinking the same thing honestly. Thursday works for me if you're free, I'm off that day. Say around noon?

subject: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Hey stranger, want to grab coffee next Tuesday morning before your shift? I feel...
body: Hey stranger, want to grab coffee next Tuesday morning before your shift? I feel like we haven't had a real catch up in weeks, just the quick texts here and there.

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Tuesday works, I don't go in til 3 that day so plenty of time. Same place as alw...
body: Tuesday works, I don't go in til 3 that day so plenty of time. Same place as always, that little spot by the park?

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Yes that place, their coffee is so much better than the chain places anyway. Let...
body: Yes that place, their coffee is so much better than the chain places anyway. Let's say 9am, that gives us a couple hours to actually talk before you have to run.

subject: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Okay so I'm turning the big 6-0 next month and I want to do a little brunch thin...
body: Okay so I'm turning the big 6-0 next month and I want to do a little brunch thing with the girls, and you of course since you're basically an honorary one at this point. You in?

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Of course I'm in, wouldn't miss it. Just tell me the date and I'll request off w...
body: Of course I'm in, wouldn't miss it. Just tell me the date and I'll request off work now before it fills up. Any particular place in mind?

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Thinking the Saturday after next, that brunch place downtown with the bottomless...
body: Thinking the Saturday after next, that brunch place downtown with the bottomless mimosas. I already called and they can hold a table for around ten of us.

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Put in for the day off, I'm all set. Let me know if you need help with anything ...
body: Put in for the day off, I'm all set. Let me know if you need help with anything for it, decorations or whatever, happy to pitch in.

subject: Renewal options
snippet: Dad, the home warranty company sent another notice about your renewal. There's t...
body: Dad, the home warranty company sent another notice about your renewal. There's three tiers now, do you want me to look through them with you or do you already know which one you want?

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Honestly no idea what the differences are, last year I just picked the middle on...
body: Honestly no idea what the differences are, last year I just picked the middle one without reading it closely. Can you take a look and tell me what you think makes sense?

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Looked it over. The middle tier covers the water heater and appliances which is ...
body: Looked it over. The middle tier covers the water heater and appliances which is probably worth it given the house's age. The top tier adds roof coverage but it's a big jump in price for something that might not happen.

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Let's stick with the middle tier again then, that sounds like the right call. Go...
body: Let's stick with the middle tier again then, that sounds like the right call. Go ahead and renew it if you're able to, or send me the link and I'll do it tonight.

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: I'll just do it now since I have the account pulled up, easier than you fumbling...
body: I'll just do it now since I have the account pulled up, easier than you fumbling with the password again. I'll forward the confirmation once it goes through.

subject: Vendor invoice question
snippet: Hey Dad, did you get a weird invoice from that lawn service? The amount looks hi...
body: Hey Dad, did you get a weird invoice from that lawn service? The amount looks higher than what they usually charge, wanted to check before you just pay it.

subject: Re: Vendor invoice question
snippet: Yeah I noticed that too, didn't get around to calling yet. I'll ring them tomorr...
body: Yeah I noticed that too, didn't get around to calling yet. I'll ring them tomorrow and ask what changed, thanks for flagging it though, easy to just pay these without looking close.

subject: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: Dad, my lease is up for renewal and they're offering a couple options, sign for ...
body: Dad, my lease is up for renewal and they're offering a couple options, sign for another year at a small increase or go month to month at a much higher rate. Wanted to get your take since you've been through this a bunch of times with rentals.

subject: Re: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: Unless you're planning on moving soon, lock in the year lease every time. Month ...
body: Unless you're planning on moving soon, lock in the year lease every time. Month to month rates are almost always a rip off unless you know for sure you're leaving in a couple months.

subject: Re: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: That's what I figured but wanted to double check. Going to sign the year lease t...
body: That's what I figured but wanted to double check. Going to sign the year lease then, at least I know what my rent will be for a while and can plan around it.

subject: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Sending you my little roundup again since you said you liked the last one. This ...
body: Sending you my little roundup again since you said you liked the last one. This week has a good piece on sleep and shift work that made me think of you, and a recipe for a slow cooker soup that looked easy.

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Read the sleep one on my break, actually pretty relevant given how my schedule's...
body: Read the sleep one on my break, actually pretty relevant given how my schedule's been lately. Might try that soup recipe this weekend if I have the ingredients.

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Let me know how it turns out if you make it. There's also a short article on ret...
body: Let me know how it turns out if you make it. There's also a short article on retirement savings basics in there this week, thought of you since we were just talking about the 401k the other night.

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Saved that one to read properly later, skimmed it during lunch and it looked use...
body: Saved that one to read properly later, skimmed it during lunch and it looked useful. Thanks for keeping sending these, it's a nice little habit to look forward to.

subject: Schedule check — Pepper sitter Wednesday
snippet: Dad, any chance I could swing by after work Wednesday? I've got a late meeting tha...
body: Dad, any chance I could swing by after work Wednesday and stay the night? I've got a late Vanderbilt meeting that got pushed and it'd be easier to drive down and see you than fight the traffic back to Nashville.

subject: Re: Schedule check — Pepper sitter Wednesday
snippet: Let me check my shift schedule, I think I'm off Wednesday but want to confirm be...
body: Let me check the clinic schedule, I think I'm on the normal 7:30 to 4:30 Wednesday but off Thursday. Give me a bit to double check before I say yes.

subject: Re: Schedule check — Pepper sitter Wednesday
snippet: No rush, just let me know by tomorrow if you can so I can figure out a backup pl...
body: No rush, just let me know by tomorrow if you can so I can figure out a backup plan if not.

subject: Re: Schedule check — Pepper sitter Wednesday
snippet: Confirmed, off after 4:30 Wednesday. Come whenever, spare key is where it always...
body: Confirmed, off after 4:30 Wednesday. Come whenever, spare key is where it always is if you beat me home. Pepper will forgive the interruption to her nap.

subject: Re: Schedule check — Pepper sitter Wednesday
snippet: Perfect, thank you. This takes a huge weight off, I'll text you when I'm on my w...
body: Perfect, thank you. This takes a huge weight off, I'll text you when I'm on my way. Might grab dinner from that Parthenon place on my way in so we don't have to cook.

subject: Family trip planning
snippet: Dad, are you still thinking about doing a family trip with Marcus and me this summer? We ...
body: Dad, are you still thinking about doing a family trip with Marcus and me this summer? We should start looking at dates soon before flights get more expensive.

subject: Re: Family vacation planning
snippet: Yes still want to do it, just need to see when I can get time off approved at wo...
body: Yes still want to do it, just need to see when I can get time off approved at work. Give me a week or so and I'll have some dates to throw out for everyone to look at.

subject: Weekend plans
snippet: Any plans this weekend? Thinking about driving down Saturday if you're around...
body: Any plans this weekend? Thinking about driving down Saturday if you're around, it's been too long since we sat on the back porch and caught up properly.

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: I'm around all weekend, no plans yet. Come by whenever works, I'd love to see...
body: I'm around all weekend, no plans yet. Come by whenever works, I'd love to see you, it's been a couple weeks. Pepper misses you too.

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: Great, I'll come Saturday afternoon then, maybe stay for dinner if that's okay...
body: Great, I'll come Saturday afternoon then, maybe stay for dinner if that's okay. I'll bring something anti-inflammatory so you don't have to cook after the week you've had.

subject: Heading down for the holidays
snippet: Dad -- planning the drive down for the holidays. Thinking I'd get in Friday evening and head back Sunday afternoon...
body: Dad -- planning the drive down for the holidays. Thinking I'd get in Friday evening and head back Sunday afternoon. Want me to bring anything from Nashville? Also, if there's a doctor visit that lines up, I'm happy to come with you. Love you. -- K

subject: A few things when you have a minute
snippet: John -- hope the week is going okay. A few things on the website side we could use help with when you have a minute...
body: John -- hope the week is going okay. A few things on the website side we could use help with when you have a minute. (1) The service-times page still shows the old fellowship-hour start. (2) The choir page needs the roster refreshed. (3) The men's-ministry sign-up form needs one extra field added. (4) The online-giving page needs a small copy fix on the thank-you screen. And the big one, whenever you're up for it, is the full overhaul of the online-giving page -- layout, copy, and the giving flow. No pressure on that last one; I know your plate is full. -- Pastor Mike
